/bin/zsh -c "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import astroid
for code in [\"a: str = None\", \"a: Optional[str] = 'str'\", \"class A:\\n def __init__(self, x: str=None): self.x=x\"]:
 n=astroid.extract_node(code)
 print('\\n',type(n),n)
 if isinstance(n,astroid.AnnAssign):
  print('ann',type(n.annotation),n.annotation.as_string(),'val',type(n.value), 'parent',type(n.value.parent))
 else:
  a=list(n.instance_attrs.values())[0][0]
  print('attr',a, 'parent',type(a.parent),a.parent)
  print('assigned',a.assigned_stmts())
  v=a.parent.value; print('value',type(v),v,'lookup',v.lookup(v.name))
  arg=n.body[0].args.args[0]; print('args',n.body[0].args.args, 'anns',n.body[0].args.annotations,'defaults',n.body[0].args.defaults)
PY"

@@ -22,2 +22,4 @@
 
+import astroid
+
 RCFILE = ".pyreverserc"
@@ -48,2 +50,56 @@
 # astroid utilities ###########################################################
+
+
+def _annotation_label(annotation, default=None):
+    """Return an inference-friendly node representing an annotation."""
+    if annotation is None:
+        return None
+    label = annotation.as_string()
+    if (
+        isinstance(default, astroid.Const)
+        and default.value is None
+        and not label.startswith("Optional[")
+    ):
+        label = f"Optional[{label}]"
+    return astroid.Name(name=label)
+
+
+def get_annotation(node):
+    """Return the type annotation associated with an assigned value or attr."""
+    parent = node.parent
+    if isinstance(parent, astroid.AnnAssign) and parent.value is node:
+        return _annotation_label(parent.annotation, parent.value)
+
+    if not isinstance(node, astroid.AssignAttr) or not isinstance(
+        parent, astroid.Assign
+    ):
+        return None
+    value = parent.value
+    if not isinstance(value, astroid.Name):
+        return None
+    frame = node.frame()
+    if not isinstance(frame, (astroid.FunctionDef, astroid.AsyncFunctionDef)):
+        return None
+    arguments = frame.args.args
+    try:
+        index = next(i for i, argument in enumerate(arguments) if argument.name == value.name)
+    except StopIteration:
+        return None
+    annotation = frame.args.annotations[index]
+    first_default = len(arguments) - len(frame.args.defaults)
+    default = frame.args.defaults[index - first_default] if index >= first_default else None
+    return _annotation_label(annotation, default)
+
+
+def infer_node(node):
+    """Infer a node, preferring its PEP 484 annotation when available."""
+    annotation = get_annotation(node)
+    if annotation is not None:
+        return {annotation}
+    try:
+        return set(node.infer())
+    except astroid.InferenceError:
+        return set()
+
+
 SPECIAL = re.compile(r"^__([^\W_]_*)+__$")
